hero.headline: *Wallpaper nightmares?* Cracked ceilings? We fix it all
hero.subheadline: Jeff Gray's crew shows up early, stays late, and leaves your walls looking better than you imagined possible.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior, exterior, repairs — handled
services_section.subheading: From stubborn wallpaper removal to full exterior makeovers

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, trim — we prep right and paint smooth. No shortcuts, no mess left behind.

services.title: Exterior House Painting
services.description: Weather protection that looks great. Proper prep work means your paint job lasts years longer.

services.title: Wall & Ceiling Repairs
services.description: Cracks, holes, texture issues — we fix the problem before we paint over it.

services.title: Wallpaper Removal
services.description: That old wallpaper comes off clean. We handle the adhesive mess and prep for fresh paint.

about.heading: Jeff Gray runs a tight crew in Columbia
about.body: We've been transforming Columbia homes one room at a time. Jeff leads every job personally — from the initial walkthrough to the final cleanup. His team shows up on time, works clean, and fixes problems the right way. No cutting corners, no surprise charges.

reviews.name: Chris C.
reviews.text: Jeff and Jose's team did excellent work. Professional, easy to communicate with, and delivered exactly what we wanted.

reviews.name: Ben B.
reviews.text: They transformed our kitchen from rough wallpaper adhesive walls into a beautiful space. Fixed ceiling cracks perfectly too.

reviews.name: Phoebe M.
reviews.text: Jeff explained everything clearly and delivered exactly what was promised. Great attention to detail and even repaired floor scratches his crew made.

reviews.name: Rhonda B.
reviews.text: Very reasonable price for exterior painting. Crew showed up on time every day and cleaned up after themselves. Thrilled with the results.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: We paint throughout the Midlands region

cta.heading: Ready to get those walls fixed right?
cta.body: Jeff personally handles every estimate. No pressure, just straight talk about what your project needs and what it'll cost.
